title: Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis: Agenda for introductory web conference - Canada.ca
content:
## Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis: Agenda for introductory web conference

## Monday, November 2, 2020, 3:00 pm to 5:00 pm Eastern time
Purpose: This introductory web conference will outline the terms of reference and mandate of the committee. Day 1 will begin introducing the various frameworks that are relevant to the committee's mandate. Day 2 will provide members with a detailed understanding of existing requirements for non-prescription health products.
Agenda Day 1: Introductions and overview of regulatory frameworks
Welcome and introductory remarks
Roundtable/introductions and icebreakers
Approval of Terms of reference/Mandate
Overview of cannabis framework
Overview of framework for health products containing cannabis

## Tuesday, November 3, 2020, 3:00 pm to 5:00 pm Eastern time
Agenda Day 2: Regulatory models
Welcome and introductory remarks
Overview of the prescription drug list
Overview of frameworks for non-prescription drugs and natural health products, and comparison of potential regulatory models for human use
Overview of veterinary drug framework and comparison of potential regulatory models for products for animal use
